# taion-expression

> A safe, sandboxed expression evaluation library for JavaScript/TypeScript. Evaluates user-provided expressions against a context object with configurable security limits.

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://taioncom.github.io/taion-expression/docs/getting-started
- AI agent reference: https://taioncom.github.io/taion-expression/docs/llms
- API reference: https://taioncom.github.io/taion-expression/docs/api-reference
- Security: https://taioncom.github.io/taion-expression/docs/security/overview
- GitHub: https://github.com/taioncom/taion-expression
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@taioncom/taion-expression

## llms-full.txt

For comprehensive library documentation optimized for AI coding agents, see:
https://taioncom.github.io/taion-expression/docs/llms
